title: sonchus × decipiens
intro: Sonchus × decipiens, also known as the sunchokes or Jerusalem artichoke, is a hybrid plant of the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. The health benefits of Sonchus × decipiens include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as tea, tinctures, and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
